_comment: Trait catalog — descriptive labels placed on cards alongside their aspect contribution. Mirrors aspects.json: top-level groups, each group holds `trait_name: description` string pairs. Trait IDs are 1-indexed in JSON insertion order across all groups (id 0 reserved as `TRAIT_NONE`). Append-only — once a trait name is assigned, never rename it; remove a trait by deleting its line and leaving a `_reserved_<name>` tombstone if downstream wire compatibility ever matters.

tile._comment: Traits whose meaning is scoped to tile cards.
tile.cost: Movement cost paid to enter the tile. Higher values represent rougher or slower terrain.

soul._comment: Traits whose meaning is scoped to soul cards.
soul.speed: Movement allowance per turn. Spent against tile `cost` when the soul traverses the map.
